recipe.title: Chicken & chorizo paella
recipe.description: A brilliant chicken and chorizo paella recipe from Jamie Oliver. This is the best paella recipe. It's perfect for a weekend lunch. Just add crusty bread.

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh flat-leaf parsley

steps.descr: Peel and finely slice the garlic, peel and roughly chop...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely slice the garlic, peel and roughly chop the onion and carrot. Finely chop the parsley stalks, then roughly chop the chorizo and chicken thighs.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely slice the garlic, peel and roughly chop the onion and carrot. Finely chop the parsley stalks, then roughly chop the chorizo and chicken thighs.

steps.descr: Put a lug of oil into a large lidded shallow casserole...
steps.instructions: Put a lug of oil into a large lidded shallow casserole or paella pan on a medium heat, add the garlic, onion, carrot, parsley stalks, chorizo, chicken and paprika, and fry for around 5 minutes, stirring regularly.

on_enter.say: Put a lug of oil into a large lidded shallow casserole or paella pan on a medium heat, add the garlic, onion, carrot, parsley stalks, chorizo, chicken and paprika, and fry for around 5 minutes, stirring regularly.

steps.descr: Deseed and chop the pepper, then add to the pan for a...
steps.instructions: Deseed and chop the pepper, then add to the pan for a further 5 minutes.

on_enter.say: Deseed and chop the pepper, then add to the pan for a further 5 minutes.

steps.descr: Stir through the tomato purée and crumble in the stock...
steps.instructions: Stir through the tomato purée and crumble in the stock cube, then add the rice and stir for a couple of minutes so it starts to suck up all that lovely flavour.

on_enter.say: Stir through the tomato purée and crumble in the stock cube, then add the rice and stir for a couple of minutes so it starts to suck up all that lovely flavour.

steps.descr: Pour in 750ml of boiling water and add a pinch of sea...
steps.instructions: Pour in 750ml of boiling water and add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Pop the lid on and bring to the boil, then reduce to a simmer for 15 minutes, stirring regularly from the outside in and from the inside out, and adding a splash of water if needed.

on_enter.say: Pour in 750ml of boiling water and add a pinch of sea salt and black pepper. Pop the lid on and bring to the boil, then reduce to a simmer for 15 minutes, stirring regularly from the outside in and from the inside out, and adding a splash of water if needed.

steps.descr: Stir in the peas and prawns, replace the lid, and cook...
steps.instructions: Stir in the peas and prawns, replace the lid, and cook for a further 5 minutes, or until hot through.

on_enter.say: Stir in the peas and prawns, replace the lid, and cook for a further 5 minutes, or until hot through.

steps.descr: Season to perfection, then chop the parsley leaves,...
steps.instructions: Season to perfection, then chop the parsley leaves, scatter them over the paella, and serve with lemon wedges on the side for squeezing over.

on_enter.say: Season to perfection, then chop the parsley leaves, scatter them over the paella, and serve with lemon wedges on the side for squeezing over.
